name: altered-launcher
title: ALTERED
description: Store, develop, and use your ideas at the speed of thought.
author: inducingchaos

commands.name: capture-voice
commands.title: Capture from Audio
commands.subtitle: ALTERED Capture
commands.description: Upload a thought using your voice.

commands.name: capture-selection
commands.title: Capture Selected Text
commands.subtitle: ALTERED Capture
commands.description: Upload a thought from the selected text.

commands.name: kai
commands.title: kAI
commands.subtitle: ALTERED kAI
commands.description: Use ALTERED's knowledge AI to interact with your thoughts.

commands.name: settings
commands.title: Configure your Brain
commands.subtitle: ALTERED Settings
commands.description: Change the settings for your ALTERED brain.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: user-id
preferences.title: User ID
preferences.description: Your unique User ID. Find it at https://altered.app/raycast
